headline: Newmont Announces Key Executive Appointments for the Next Phase of Delivery
summary: DENVER, June 15, 2026--Newmont Corporation (NYSE: NEM, ASX: NEM, PNGX: NEM) ("Newmont") today announced leadership appointments that further shape its go-forward Executive Leadership Team under President and Chief Executive Officer Natascha Viljoen and reflect the depth of leadership talent within the company. Effective July 1, 2026, Brian Tabolt has been appointed Chief Financial Officer, Mark Rodgers has been appointed Chief Operating Officer, and David Thornton has been appointed Chief Techni

headline: Gold Royalty Announces Acquisition of Additional Interest in REN Royalty, Release of 2026 Integrated Report and Reminds Shareholders of Capital Markets Day
summary: Gold Royalty Corp. ("Gold Royalty" or the "Company") (NYSE American: GROY) is pleased to announce the acquisition of an additional interest in an existing royalty over the REN project, the release of its 2026 Integrated Report, and further details on the Company's Capital Markets Day.

headline: Top Research Reports for Pfizer, Altria & Newmont Corp.

headline: The Hormuz Reopening Trade: These 20 Large-Cap Stocks Still Haven't Caught Up To Pre-War Levels
summary: Wall Street marched near records as the Strait of Hormuz reopens and oil sinks. Yet 20 large caps, from Abbott to Alibaba, still trade below their pre-war close.

headline: Gold Jumps After US and Iran Agree Deal That Would Reopen Hormuz
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Gold and silver rallied after the US and Iran announced an interim deal to end hostilities and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, easing global inflation fears and potentially tempering expectations for interest-rate hikes.Most Read from BloombergIran’s Deputy Foreign Minister Confirms Deal Reached With USUS and Iran Agree to Halt War, Restart Middle East Oil ShipmentsIran Signals No Deal Will Be Signed by Trump’s Sunday TimelineWhy Musk Raced to Take SpaceX Public in the World’s Bigges
